Hero.title: Your key to freedom on the road
Hero.subtitle: A premium fleet, pick-up at 6 locations, and booking without compromise. From city cars to luxury saloons.

Fleet.subtitle: A carefully maintained fleet for every need and budget.
Fleet.noResults: No vehicles available for the selected dates. Try another period or contact us.

Inquiry.subtitle: Send an inquiry or reach us on WhatsApp — we reply as soon as possible.
Inquiry.successBody: Thank you. Our team will get back to you shortly with availability confirmation.
Inquiry.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

Footer.tagline: Rent a Car — reliable car rental across Herzegovina.

About.title: About us
About.lead: Maximum Rent a Car — your mobility partner in Herzegovina.
About.p1: For years we have provided car rental with a focus on reliability, a spotless fleet, and fast, friendly service. Our fleet ranges from 25 to 30 vehicles, from economical city cars to luxury saloons and SUVs.
About.p2: Pick-up and return is available at six locations across Herzegovina, including Mostar Airport and the main bus stations, making your trip effortless from the moment you arrive.

Business.title: Business offer
Business.lead: Flexible rental for companies, agencies and longer periods.
Business.intro: We offer tailored terms for business clients — from long-term rental to packages for groups and transfers. Contact us for a personalised quote.
Business.f1Body: Special rates for rentals over one month, maintenance included.
Business.f2Body: Solutions for companies needing several vehicles on a single invoice.
Business.f3Body: Vehicle delivery and pick-up at the airport and hotels.

Terms.title: Rental terms
Terms.lead: Transparent terms for a worry-free rental.
items: Minimum driver age is 21, with a driving licence held for over 2 years.
A valid ID/passport and driving licence are required to collect the vehicle.
The rental price includes basic insurance, BiH vignettes and unlimited mileage.
The deposit depends on the vehicle class and is fully refunded after a proper return.
The vehicle is collected and returned with a full fuel tank.
Taking the vehicle outside BiH is possible with prior notice and the right paperwork.
Free cancellation is available up to 48 hours before pick-up.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.lead: We are here for all your questions and reservations.

WhyChoose.title: Rental without compromise
WhyChoose.subtitle: Everything you need for a carefree trip — from pick-up to return.

items.title: 6 locations
items.body: Pick-up and return in Čitluk, Mostar, Međugorje, Čapljina and Ljubuški.

items.title: All included
items.body: Insurance, BiH vignettes and unlimited mileage — no hidden costs.

items.title: Modern fleet
items.body: Regularly maintained, spotless vehicles, from city cars to luxury.

items.title: 24/7 support
items.body: We're here at every moment of your journey.

HowItWorks.title: Your car in three steps
HowItWorks.subtitle: No online payment — booking is quick and simple, by inquiry.

steps.title: Choose a vehicle
steps.body: Browse the fleet and pick the dates that suit you.

steps.title: Send an inquiry
steps.body: Send your inquiry via the form or WhatsApp in a few clicks.

steps.title: Pick up the keys
steps.body: We confirm availability and meet you at the agreed location.

Locations.title: Pick-up across Herzegovina
Locations.subtitle: We welcome you at Mostar Airport too — your car is ready the moment you land.

Reviews.title: Rated 4.8 on Google
Reviews.subtitle: Average rating based on {count} reviews from satisfied customers.

BusinessTeaser.title: Business rental & transfers
BusinessTeaser.body: Long-term rental with maintenance included, fleet solutions on a single invoice, and transfers to the airport and hotels.

items.q: What is the minimum rental age?
items.a: 21 years, with a driving licence held for over 2 years.

items.q: What do I need to collect the vehicle?
items.a: A valid ID or passport and a driving licence.

items.q: What's included in the rental price?
items.a: Basic insurance, BiH vignettes and unlimited mileage.
The deposit depends on the vehicle class and is fully refunded after a proper return.

items.q: Can I take the vehicle outside BiH?
items.a: Yes, with prior notice and the right paperwork.
Free cancellation is available up to 48 hours before pick-up.

FinalCta.title: Ready to hit the road?
FinalCta.subtitle: Book a vehicle in a few clicks — we confirm availability as soon as possible.
